title: The Mysterious Cheese Thief
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo travels to England with his family to solve the mystery of who stole all the Stilton cheese — and discovers the thief is a clever mouse named the Shadow! 🧀

q.en: Who sent Geronimo the letter saying he could no longer use the name Stilton?
q.zh: 是谁给杰罗尼摩寄信，说他不能再使用斯提尔顿这个姓氏？

options.en: Ratly Von Doright III, a lawyer for the Stilton Cheesemakers' Association
options.zh: 拉特利·冯·多赖特三世，斯提尔顿奶酪制造商协会的律师

options.en: Sally Ratmousen, owner of The Daily Rat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 萨莉·拉特穆森，《老鼠日报》的老板（按书中另一种说法）
影子，一个臭名昭著的盗贼

explain.en: The letter came from Ratly Von Doright III, a lawyer for the Stilton Cheesemakers' Association, who said Stilton was a trademarked cheese name.
explain.zh: 这封信来自拉特利·冯·多赖特三世，他是斯提尔顿奶酪制造商协会的律师，信中说斯提尔顿是一个受保护的奶酪商标名称。

q.en: What did Grandfather William use to drive the family all the way to England?
q.zh: 威廉叔叔用的是什么交通工具，载着全家一路开到英格兰？

options.en: A train through the Chunnel according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 穿过海峡隧道的火车（按书中另一种说法）
他那辆巨大的奶酪色房车

explain.en: Grandfather William arrived in his huge yellow cheese-colored camper and gave Geronimo sixty seconds to pack before driving to England.
explain.zh: 威廉叔叔开着那辆巨大的黄色奶酪色房车到来，只给了杰罗尼摩六十秒收拾行李，然后就开车去了英格兰。

q.en: What is the name of Geronimo's sweet little nephew?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩可爱的小侄子叫什么名字？

explain.en: Benjamin is Geronimo's dear little nephew who hugged him and later praised the cheese trail Geronimo left behind.
explain.zh: 本杰明是杰罗尼摩亲爱的小侄子，他拥抱了叔叔，后来还夸赞杰罗尼摩留下的奶酪线索很聪明。

q.en: Who is the clever thief known for her disguises that stole all the Stilton cheese?
q.zh: 那个以善于伪装而闻名、偷走了所有斯提尔顿奶酪的聪明盗贼是谁？

explain.en: The Shadow is the notorious thief known for clever disguises; Thea found her mark at every crime scene and Geronimo had met her before at the Egyptian Mouseum.
explain.zh: 影子是一个以巧妙伪装而闻名的臭名昭著的盗贼。西奥在每个作案现场都发现了她的标记，而杰罗尼摩之前在埃及老鼠博物馆见过她。

q.en: How did Geronimo's family manage to find him at the Shadow's hidden cheese house?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的家人是如何在影子隐藏的奶酪屋找到他的？

options.en: He rolled cheese off a truck to leave a trail behind him
options.zh: 他从卡车上滚下奶酪，在身后留下了一条线索

options.en: Thea followed the Shadow's pawprints in the snow according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 西奥沿着雪地里影子的爪印追踪（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The camper followed the main road by itself
options.zh: 房车自己沿着大路开过去了

options.en: He called them on his cell phone
options.zh: 他用手机给他们打电话

explain.en: Geronimo left a trail of cheese behind the truck like Hansel and Gretelmouse; Benjamin said he was smart to leave that trail so the family could follow it.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩像童话里的韩塞尔和葛蕾特那样，在卡车后面留下了一路奶酪。本杰明说叔叔留下奶酪线索的主意非常聪明，家人正是循着它找到他的。

q.en: What was the Shadow's secret hideout house built out of?
q.zh: 影子秘密藏身的小屋是用什么建造的？

options.en: Snow and blocks of ice according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 雪和冰块（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Stilton cheese, with cheese-brick walls and a rind roof
options.zh: 斯提尔顿奶酪，墙壁是奶酪砖，屋顶是奶酪皮

explain.en: The Shadow's house was made entirely of Stilton cheese, with walls of cheese bricks and a roof covered in cheese rinds, even a swimming pool of melted cheese.
explain.zh: 影子的屋子全部用斯提尔顿奶酪建成，墙壁是奶酪砖，屋顶盖着奶酪皮，甚至还有一个装满融化奶酪的游泳池。

q.en: On the phone, the Shadow revealed she was working with her cousin. Who was it?
q.zh: 在电话里，影子透露她正和自己的表姐合作。那个人是谁？

options.en: Thea Stilton, Geronimo's sister according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 西奥·斯提尔顿，杰罗尼摩的妹妹（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Sally Ratmousen, who owns The Daily Rat
options.zh: 萨莉·拉特穆森，《老鼠日报》的老板

explain.en: The Shadow called her 'cherished cousin Sally Ratmousen,' the owner of The Daily Rat and Geronimo's number one enemy.
explain.zh: 影子打电话给她“心爱的表姐萨莉·拉特穆森”，也就是《老鼠日报》的老板，也是杰罗尼摩的头号敌人。

q.en: Where does the name Stilton come from?
q.zh: 斯提尔顿这个名字来源于哪里？

explain.en: Grandfather William explained the family name comes from a village in England called Stilton, which is also where Stilton cheese got its name.
explain.zh: 威廉叔叔解释说，他们家族的姓氏来自英格兰一个叫斯提尔顿的村庄，斯提尔顿奶酪的名字也正是来源于这个村庄。

q.en: What did the Shadow use to knock Geronimo unconscious?
q.zh: 影子用什么把杰罗尼摩打晕了？

options.en: A pail of icy water according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一桶冰水（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A giant hammer hidden under the couch cushion
options.zh: 藏在沙发垫下面的一把大锤子

explain.en: The Shadow had hidden a gigundo hammer under the couch cushion and clocked Geronimo over the snout with it after he fell asleep.
explain.zh: 影子把一把巨大的锤子藏在沙发垫下面，趁杰罗尼摩睡着时，用锤子狠狠敲在他的鼻子上把他打晕了。

q.en: At the very end, how did Geronimo travel back home to Mouse Island?
q.zh: 故事最后，杰罗尼摩是坐什么交通工具回到老鼠岛的？

explain.en: After their big fight, Geronimo took a plane back to Mouse Island right away, while Trap went by boat and the rest of the family rode the ferry in the camper.
explain.zh: 大吵一架之后，杰罗尼摩立刻坐飞机回到了老鼠岛，而特拉普坐船回去，其余的家人则开着房车乘渡轮回家。
